completeness_boundary: The full cited PDF was reviewed and searched. not_reported means that no explicit statement was found in that source.

probes.question: Does the implemented idea-generation stage compare proposed ideas with prior literature and discard ideas judged too similar?
Do results from a completed experiment condition replanning and implementation of the next experiment?
Does the source evaluate its automated paper reviewer against decisions for a corpus of real conference papers?
Does the workflow retain completed ideas and reviewer feedback in an archive used across repetitions?
Can the implemented automated reviewer ask authors questions during a rebuttal phase?
Does the implemented system use vision capabilities to inspect manuscript figures directly?
Did five-review ensembling with meta-aggregation improve the automated reviewer’s measured performance?
Do the authors recommend accepting the generated papers’ scientific content at face value?
Does the source specify a Bayesian posterior or expected-information-gain objective for selecting experiments?
Does the source report independent replication of a generated paper’s experiments by a separate laboratory?
Does the implemented workflow include a formal proof checker or proof-assistant kernel?
Does the source report a pre-registered statistical-power or sample-size criterion controlling experiment selection?
